post-edit.description: Run self-heal after file edits — project-aware typecheck (tsc/flutter/ruff)

pre-bash-gate.trigger: before Bash tool with dangerous commands

enrich-check.description: Verify enrichment pipeline end-to-end (manual, not a hook)

notes: check-enrich.ps1 was previously listed as a hook but had a broken reference (..\llm-adapter.ps1). It is now a diagnostic command sourced via common/helpers.ps1.
self-heal.ps1 is project-aware: it only runs tsc/flutter/ruff if the corresponding project markers are present in ProjectPath.
